prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild at a wooden strategy table. Eri Moonvale, a feminine ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, stands beside Eri Ashbell, an androgynous adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf. Moonvale reaches out to carefully adjust the leather straps on Ashbell's shoulder armor, both characters focused on a quest map. Warm, detailed lighting, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermarks.

Continuous shot from the same camera angle. Eri Ashbell nods in acknowledgment, secures the final strap, and points to a marked location on the quest map. Eri Moonvale leans in closer, nodding in tactical agreement as they both finalize their gear checks, preparing for a mission. Consistent character appearance, fluid movement, no text, no watermarks.
